## 2023-02-03 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Lead Management Product Launch should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write a simple problem statement for Lead Management Product Launch and the user it serves so the project had a decent base. I was still mostly figuring out the shape of it, so a lot of the day went into small notes and half clear ideas. I was also trying to keep the idea grounded so it did not drift into random features for no reason.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem statement written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. It was not super polished, just stable enough that I felt okay moving forward.
